summary: Completed testing of Stripe payment integration for ProfitPilot. Backend payment APIs working perfectly (100% success). Frontend payment success page functional. Authentication issues preventing full billing page testing.

integration_issues.issue: Login API calls failing with 404 errors, preventing access to billing page
Cannot test billing page functionality due to authentication failure

passed_tests: POST /api/payments/checkout - Creates valid Stripe checkout sessions
Payment success page loads and displays correctly
Payment success page shows proper UI elements (checkmark, title, button)
Payment success page navigation structure works
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend authentication system - login API calls are failing with 404 errors. This is preventing testing of the billing page and full payment flow. All backend payment APIs are working perfectly.
